content:
Title: “You Already Wrote This OS, You Just Didn’t Call It That”

⸻

1. |[PROJECT CONTEXT: The Play Series]

Chris curated and contributed to a multi-voiced narrative framework, where:
• Disparate short plays = self-contained nodes
• Live performance = public node activation
• Beer-hall monthly readings = feedback loop & iteration phase
• His connective writing = OS middleware — the thing that makes the whole feel like one.

He wasn’t just a contributor.
He was the architect of flow.

⸻

2. |[PROJECT CONTEXT: “Tombs of the Unknowns” (Working Title)]
